meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve Scaling Issues
content.seo_description: Break the freelance grind. Learn to transform your coding workflow into passive income systems using Antigravity and Claude Code in this intermediate guide.
content.answer_block: To escape the 'time-for-money' trap, pivot from bespoke client work to modular, productized micro-SaaS solutions. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous feature iteration, you can deploy high-value, low-maintenance assets that generate recurring revenue, effectively decoupling your income from your hourly billable capacity.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, yet your bank account is stagnant. You’ve mastered the craft of custom development, but you’re trapped in a cycle of endless delivery, where every dollar earned requires an hour sacrificed. Scaling your agency is an illusion if you are the bottleneck in every single pull request.

The shift happens when you stop being a service provider and start being an architect of systems. By automating the production of functional, self-sustaining codebases, you can transition from selling labor to selling outcomes. This tutorial provides the blueprint to reclaim your time and build a portfolio of digital assets that work while you sleep.

steps.title: Define Your Micro-SaaS Niche
steps.description: Identify a repeatable problem you solved for a previous client and abstract it into a standalone tool.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my previous project history and identify three high-demand features that can be converted into independent micro-SaaS modules.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research --query 'market trends for niche automation tools 2024'

steps.title: Architecting for Scalability
steps.description: Structure your base code to be multi-tenant from day one, ensuring minimal maintenance overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a multi-tenant database schema and authentication wrapper for a modular SaaS architecture using Next.js and Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold project structure with multi-tenant support'

steps.title: Automated Feature Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to rapidly spin up core functionality modules based on your predefined Antigravity specs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a boilerplate for a Stripe-integrated subscription handler that supports role-based access control.

steps.title: Implementing Autonomous CI/CD
steps.description: Set up a pipeline that tests and deploys code without manual intervention, keeping your micro-SaaS live.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs unit tests and deploys to Vercel on every main branch push.

steps.title: Optimization for Recurring Value
steps.description: Refine the user experience to ensure low churn, allowing the product to sit as a passive income stream.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze existing code for potential performance bottlenecks and suggest caching strategies for high-traffic endpoints.

pro_tips: Always build for 'zero-support'—if a feature requires a manual configuration step, it’s a liability, not an asset.
Use Claude Code to write your documentation and README files simultaneously with the code to ensure they never drift.
Prioritize 'boring' tech stacks; your goal is stability for passive income, not experimenting with the latest unstable frameworks.
Implement automated error tracking (like Sentry) before you launch; passive income dies the moment a user encounters an unhandled exception.
Package your code into a private repository template so you can clone and launch a new micro-SaaS instance in under 60 minutes.
content.next_steps: Once your first micro-SaaS is live, focus on SEO and cold-email outreach to acquire your first 10 users. Monitor usage patterns for 30 days, then use Claude Code to iterate based on actual user feedback before moving to your second product.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your hours for dollars and start building a portfolio that compounds. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
